Home / Service Areas / Ontario

Flooring contractor in Ontario, CA

Trusted local professionals serving Ontario and surrounding communities

Serving Ontario, CA

USA Floor Contractor is committed to providing exceptional flooring services to Ontario, CA. With a mix of residential and commercial properties, Ontario requires a diverse range of flooring solutions. We offer tile repair, hardwood floor refinishing, and new installations, catering to both homeowners and businesses. Ontario's warm climate and busy environment demand flooring that is both durable and aesthetically pleasing. Our team is dedicated to providing top-quality materials and expert workmanship, ensuring that your floors look great and last for years. Whether you're renovating your home or upgrading your business, USA Floor Contractor is your trusted partner in Ontario.

Ontario's warm climate and diverse property types require durable and versatile flooring solutions.

Flooring contractor Services in Ontario

Tile Repair & Replacement

Restore the beauty and functionality of your tile floors and surfaces.

Learn more →

Hardwood Floor Refinishing

Bring your worn hardwood floors back to life with our expert refinishing services.

Learn more →

Laminate Flooring Installation

Affordable and stylish laminate flooring installation for any room.

Learn more →

Vinyl Flooring Installation

Durable and waterproof vinyl flooring solutions for kitchens, bathrooms, and more.

Learn more →

Floor Leveling Services

Ensure a smooth and even surface for your new flooring installation.

Learn more →

Baseboard & Trim Installation

Add the perfect finishing touch to your flooring project with our baseboard and trim installation services.

Learn more →
